description.value:
Benefit: You gain one of the following benefits based on your planet of origin: - Barren World: +4 Survival and +4 Constitution checks vs starvation/thirst. - Cold World: +4 Fortitude vs extreme cold, cold resistance 5. - Dark World: Darkvision 60 ft. - High-G World: +2 Strength; reduce base height by 6 inches. - Hot World: +4 Fortitude vs extreme heat, fire resistance 5. - Low-G World: +2 Dexterity; increase base height by 6 inches. - Water World: +4 Swim checks; hold breath for twice your Constitution score in rounds.

Special: Can only be taken at 1st level. May be selected more than once if multiple feats are gained at 1st level; each time you choose this feat, you gain a different benefit.
